positive: A minimalist, geometric representation of a majestic fox standing poised in a stylized, abstract forest setting. The fox should be rendered in a clean, elegant silhouette with striking orange and deep sapphire accents. Use negative space principles, strong contrasting colors, and hard edges for a graphic, modern look. Composition must be centralized, suitable for a chest print on a t-shirt. Incorporate abstract woodland elements like geometric ferns and crystalized moonlight beams. Style: Vector illustration meets modern folk art, inspired by Scandinavian design, ultra-high resolution, maximal contrast, pop art aesthetic, perfect for apparel printing.
